title: DependencyDAG
description: Directed acyclic graph of Task dependencies emitted by Plan & Task Breakdown. Nodes and edges use qualified workItemRef so cross-project references are unambiguous. Acyclicity is a runtime invariant — schema validation cannot enforce it; tools must check separately.

nodes.description: Task references participating in the DAG. Must be unique.

edges.description: Directed edges from prerequisite to dependent: 'to' cannot start until 'from' completes. Both endpoints must appear in nodes (runtime check). Duplicate edges are rejected.
